aknrenderer-extensionname: The name of the extension, shown on [[Special:Version]] and in the extension credits.
aknrenderer-desc:
{{desc|name=Akoma Ntoso Renderer|url=https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:AknRenderer}}
Short description of the extension, shown on [[Special:Version]].
content-model-akn-xml: Human-readable name of the 'akn-xml' content model. Shown on [[Special:Version]], page information ({{int:pageinfo-content-model}}), and [[Special:ChangeContentModel]].
aknrenderer-render-invalidxml: Error box shown on a Law page whose stored content is not well-formed XML and therefore cannot be parsed for rendering.
aknrenderer-render-nobody: Warning box shown when an otherwise valid Akoma Ntoso document contains no body element to render.
pageinfo-aknrenderer: Section title on the action=info page for the group of metadata extracted from the Akoma Ntoso document. Used as {{int:pageinfo-aknrenderer}}.
aknrenderer-revisions-tab: Label of the tab that replaces "View history" on Law pages, linking to action=revisions.
aknrenderer-revisions-title: Page heading for action=revisions. $1 is the law's page title.
aknrenderer-revisions-intro: Introductory line above the version table on action=revisions.
aknrenderer-revisions-empty: Shown on action=revisions when no versions are indexed for the page yet.
aknrenderer-revisions-notakn: Shown on action=revisions when the page is not an Akoma Ntoso document.
aknrenderer-revisions-col-effective: Column header: date the version came into force.
aknrenderer-revisions-col-fek: Column header: the government gazette (ΦΕΚ) that caused the version.
aknrenderer-revisions-col-status: Column header: legal-force status of the version.
aknrenderer-revisions-status-active: Status value: this version is currently in force.
aknrenderer-revisions-status-expired: Status value: this version has been superseded by a later one.
aknrenderer-revisions-status-future: Status value: this version's effective date is in the future.
aknrenderer-revisions-version: Fallback link label when a version has no effective date. $1 is the revision id.
